title: He Has a $25 Million Bounty on His Head but Is Also a U.S. Partner in Venezuela
summary_full: A list of alleged crimes has not prevented Diosdado Cabello, and other Venezuelan officials, from working with a U.S. government that once hounded them.
summary_public: A list of alleged crimes has not prevented Diosdado Cabello, and other Venezuelan officials, from working with a U.S. government that once hounded them.
